new_classes.label_en: Other Fruit Spirit (spirits distilled from fruit other than plums, pears or cherries, CN 2208 90 48)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Obstbranntwein (aus anderen Früchten als Pflaumen, Birnen oder Kirschen, KN 2208 90 48)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverage obtained exclusively by alcoholic fermentation and distillation of fruit other than plums, pears or cherries (e.g. apricots, bilberries, raspberries, blackberries, currants, strawberries, apples), corresponding to CN subheading 2208 90 48.

new_classes.label_en: Other Fruit Fermentation and Distillation Process (fruit other than plums, pears or cherries)
new_classes.label_de: Vergärungs- und Destillationsprozess aus anderen Früchten (ausgenommen Pflaumen, Birnen oder Kirschen)
new_classes.definition_en: Process of alcoholic fermentation and distillation applied exclusively to fruit other than plums, pears or cherries (e.g. apricots, bilberries, raspberries, blackberries, currants, strawberries, apples) to produce other fruit spirits under CN 2208 90 48.

new_classes.label_en: Other Fruit Feedstock (fruit other than plums, pears or cherries)
new_classes.label_de: Anderes Obstmaterial (ausgenommen Pflaumen, Birnen oder Kirschen)
new_classes.definition_en: Material entity representing fruit other than plums, pears or cherries (e.g. apricots, bilberries, raspberries, blackberries, currants, strawberries, apples) used as the exclusive feedstock for the production of other fruit spirits under CN 2208 90 48.

new_classes.label_en: Other Fruit Spirit in containers ≤ 2 L (CN 2208 90 48)
new_classes.definition_en: Other fruit spirit (distilled from fruit other than plums, pears or cherries) presented in containers of 2 litres or less, corresponding to CN subheading 2208 90 48.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the main distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 90 48: (1) the product is a spirituous beverage (subclass of SpiritousBeverage); (2) it is produced exclusively by alcoholic fermentation and distillation (OtherFruitFermentationDistillationProcess, a subclass of DistillationProcess); (3) the feedstock is fruit other than plums, pears or cherries (OtherFruitFeedstock, with a complement restriction excluding StoneFruitMash); (4) a small-container variant is modelled using the existing SmallContainer class. Gaps: (a) the 'exclusively' constraint on the feedstock (i.e. no other raw material may be used) is not fully formalised in OWL DL without a universal restriction; (b) the specific enumeration of permissible fruit types (apricots, bilberries, raspberries, blackberries, currants, strawberries, apples, etc.) cannot be exhaustively expressed as named classes without introducing a very large number of new classes; (c) the large-container variant (CN 2208 90 78) is a sibling code and not modelled here. The legal note's text is truncated in the source (ends at 'appl'), suggesting the list of examples continues — any additional fruit types in the full text are not captured but are treated as examples rather than exhaustive enumeration.
